$schema: Shopify URL Redirects — paths that must continue to redirect after the migration cutover.
$applicationNote: Loaded by next.config.mjs at build time and emitted as Next.js redirects(). Edge-evaluated.

redirects.$note: Phase 261: 282 4xx URLs from May SEMrush export — fuzzy-matched to nearest live product/collection, or routed to /collections/mattresses (products) / /blogs/<category> (article slugs) as the safe fallback to preserve link equity. Bulk-generated; specific overrides applied for pillow/protector/Tempur/Helix/sale variants.

Phase 260: bare blog index — Phase 251's :slug* wildcard does not match the empty-slug case, so the blog index page would still render. Redirect to the sleep-blog landing where the consolidated content lives.
Phase 251: catch-all for ~287 old Hydrogen blog slugs not covered by specific redirects above. Ordered LAST so the specific entries win first; this wildcard only fires for unmatched slugs.
